prompt: A black and white infrared trail camera photo taken at night in a dense coniferous forest. In the foreground on the left, a large black bear is walking past, appearing slightly motion-blurred. In the center of the clearing, there is a perfectly circular, dark, barren patch of dirt on the forest floor. Hovering just above the ground at the far edge of this dark circle is a bright, glowing, spherical orb of light. The image features a grainy night vision aesthetic with visible underbrush, pine tree trunks, and a tree stump in the bottom right corner. A black data bar runs across the bottom edge containing white text: on the far left, an oval logo reading "{argument name="camera brand" default="RECONYX"}", followed by the timestamp "{argument name="timestamp" default="03:14:22 11-OCT-2023"}", then "{argument name="temperature" default="TEMP: 4°C"}", and on the far right, "{argument name="trigger info" default="TRIGGER: MOTION DUAL TRIGGER"}".
translatedPrompt: 一张在深夜针叶林中拍摄的黑白红外相机照片。前景左侧，一只巨大的黑熊正走过，带有轻微的动态模糊。林间空地中央，地面上有一块完美的圆形、黑暗且贫瘠的泥土地。在那片黑暗圆圈的最边缘，离地悬浮着一个明亮、发光的球体。图像呈现出颗粒感的夜视美学，可以看到底部的灌木丛、松树树干以及右下角的树桩。底部边缘有一条黑色数据栏，上面印有白色文字：最左侧是一个椭圆形标志，写着“{argument name="camera brand" default="RECONYX"}”，接着是时间戳“{argument name="timestamp" default="03:14:22 11-OCT-2023"}”，然后是“{argument name="temperature" default="TEMP: 4°C"}”，最右侧是“{argument name="trigger info" default="TRIGGER: MOTION DUAL TRIGGER"}”。

breakdown.creativeCore: 超自然红外相机抓拍：生成一张带有野生动物、神秘发光球体以及逼真相机数据叠加层的惊悚红外相机照片。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.bestUse: B2B 产品概念图、后台系统、数据看板

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
